files.baseReadonlyHint: Base maps are read-only in this editor. To draw and save a scene, save a copy as a new child map.
files.noBaseCandidates: No base map with a saved boundary. Open any bundled base map with boundary markup or define a boundary on your own base map.
files.saveAsChildTitle: Create a child map with the same boundary and a copy of the scene for editing
files.saveAsNewTitle: Create a new map with a different name and copy the current scene

importModal.title: Import .hideout
importModal.hint: The map will appear in the list with the boundary of the selected base map. By default, the name is taken from the file name if the field below is empty.

background.baseReadonlyHint: Background is view-only on base maps. Create a child map to edit the background and fit it to the zone.
background.deleteTitle: Delete selected file from app catalog
background.hint: In select mode on canvas: dragging center moves; edge/corner scales; RMB + move rotates. “Lock in place” disables all of this.
background.pickFileFirst: Select a background file from the list first.
background.deleteConfirm: Delete file “{{name}}” from app catalog? This action cannot be undone.

tools.modeReadonly: Tools and scene edits are disabled on base maps. Create a child map to draw and edit objects.
tools.lineHint: Brush-like behavior: hold LMB and drag — line follows cursor (cyan stroke), objects are packed along the path. Releasing fixes the stroke (even if cursor leaves canvas).
tools.eraserHint: Disable object types the eraser should ignore (active layer only). Brush size sets hit radius while moving the mouse.
tools.fillRadiusHelp: Limits expansion distance from the clicked seed point
tools.fillMinPassageWidthHelp: Do not fill corridors narrower than this threshold
tools.fillSpacingHelp: Lower values create denser fill but add more objects
tools.fillMarginHelp: Inner offset from wall objects. 0 is default, higher values leave a gap to walls
tools.zoneMarginHelp: Safety distance from the map outline for placed objects
tools.fillLimitHelp: Cap for a single fill operation. The game supports at most {{gameLimit}} objects total in a hideout
tools.fillHint1: Fill searches for a closed area: walls are built from existing objects (their height is locally stretched by 1.5 along rotation axis). Fill preview is shown before click.
tools.fillHint2: “Margin from fill zone edge” is measured from fill-area walls (contour objects). 0 is default (fill objects can slightly overlap walls). Larger values leave a gap. “Margin from map boundary” applies to map boundary itself.

selection.moveToNewLayerTitle: Create a new layer and move selected objects there
selection.moveToNewLayerAria: Move selected objects to a new layer
selection.selectedManyHint: Selected objects: {{count}}. Drag and RMB-rotate affect all selected; precise X/Y/° is available only for a single selected object.
selection.singleHint: LMB — drag object. RMB — rotate around center from any canvas point (circular movement).
selection.hotkeysHint: Hotkeys: Q/E rotate, Delete removes, Ctrl+Z undo, Ctrl+Y / Ctrl+Shift+Z redo. Selection: click object; marquee on empty space (drag LMB); LMB drags all selected, RMB rotates group around center; ° field is for single object.

layers.baseReadonlyHint: Layers are read-only on base maps. Create a child map to work with layers and objects.

status.mapDeletedNoMaps: Map deleted. No maps left in database.
status.reservedBaseName: This name is reserved for a base map
status.importDone: Map “{{name}}”: template layer uses fixed/optional objects; decorations are on layer 1 (other) and optionally layer 2 (palette-recognized assets); boundary is copied from base map
status.noTemplateForExport: No map template — choose a map in the left list
status.exportOverLimitConfirm: The hideout has {{count}} objects, but the game supports at most {{limit}}. Such a .hideout may load incorrectly or be rejected by the game. Download anyway?
status.bgNeedZoneAndImage: Need zone boundary and loaded image
status.copyNoEligible: There are no objects that can be copied
status.pasteOnTemplateLocked: Paste unavailable on template layer — unlock a user layer
status.pasteClipboardNoEligible: Clipboard contains no objects that can be pasted
status.pasteOutOfZone: Paste goes outside allowed area — move cursor inside map or reduce margin
status.cannotDeleteImportedDecorationsLayer: Imported decorations layer cannot be deleted
status.layerDeleteBlockedIneligibleObjects: Layer cannot be deleted while it contains objects without editor preview
status.needAtLeastOneUserLayer: Template layer plus at least one user layer are required
status.movedToNewLayerPartial: Moved to new layer: {{count}} objects. Skipped: {{skipped}}
status.moveToNewLayerDefaultObjects: Default-layer objects cannot be moved to a new layer
status.moveToNewLayerNoEligible: There are no objects that can be moved to a new layer
status.moveToNewLayerOnlyUserLayers: Move to a new layer is available only for objects on user layers
status.moveToNewLayerFailed: Failed to move objects to a new layer
status.moveCancelledOutOfBoundary: Some objects leave boundary — move canceled
status.moveCancelledCollision: Move conflicts with other objects — move canceled
status.moveCancelledCollisionAt: Move conflicts at ({{x}}, {{y}}) with object on layer {{layer}} — move canceled
status.rotateCancelledOutOfBoundary: Some objects leave boundary — rotation canceled
status.rotateCancelledCollision: Rotation conflicts with other objects — rotation canceled
status.rotateCancelledCollisionAt: Rotation conflicts at ({{x}}, {{y}}) with object on layer {{layer}} — rotation canceled
status.deleteNoEligible: There are no objects that can be deleted
status.transformLimit: No more than {{count}} objects per move/rotate operation
status.rotateCoordConflict: Rotation causes duplicate coordinates between objects
status.cannotDrawLineDefaultLayer: Cannot draw line on default layer
status.strokeDuplicates: Stroke places two objects at the same coordinate — change trajectory
status.cannotAddObjectDefaultLayer: Cannot add objects to default layer
status.pointOutOfZone: Point is outside zone or too close to boundary
status.pointOccupied: Object already exists at this coordinate
status.eraserNeedTarget: Select at least one object type for eraser
status.eraserNoHit: Eraser did not hit any object
status.fillNoDefaultLayer: Fill cannot be applied on default layer
status.fillInvalidSeed: Fill seed is outside zone or too close to boundary
status.fillTooLarge: Fill aborted: area is too large (increase spacing or narrow zone)
status.fillOpenArea: Area is not closed: fill reaches outer contour/gap
status.fillNoArea: No available closed area for fill

prompts.baseMapDeleteHint: This is a base map — all child maps will also be deleted ({{count}}).
prompts.childMapDeleteHint: Child maps will be deleted together with this map (total maps: {{count}}).
